s: v1 job schema — userId, email, locale. Enqueued on signup by API; consumed by worker.

locale.notes: BCP-47. v1 worker treats any value as `en`.

ex.producer: API enqueues exactly once per successful signup. No deduplication on the API side.
ex.consumer: Worker is responsible for idempotency if it adds retry in v2 (no requirement for v1).
ex.coupling: Fire-and-forget: API never reads job status.
